name: confluence-export-kit
description: Codex plugin for Confluence export and local export-index workflows: unified config setup, page, space, org, page-with-descendants export, export indexing, and confluence-markdown-exporter bootstrap.

interface.shortDescription: Export Confluence content and index local Markdown exports
interface.longDescription: confluence-export-kit provides Confluence export and local export-index workflows powered by confluence-markdown-exporter. Configure auth and output defaults, export single or multiple pages, full spaces, page descendants, or full organizations to local Markdown files, then index already-exported Markdown for agent-friendly reading.
defaultPrompt: Set my Confluence API key and default export output path so I can start exporting pages.
Export the Confluence space at <space-url> to a local Markdown folder.
Export one or more Confluence pages at <page-url> [<page-url> ...] to ./docs/.
Index a local Confluence export folder and install Reading Rules: <export-path>
